notes: Rubric for the Jason intake submission agent (netlify/functions/jason-intake-submit.js). Scored per-submission for validation + handoff; weekly batch review for completeness + compliance trends.

data_completeness.description: All required fields captured (name, email, phone OR preference-email-only, vertical, stated problem). Enrichment (Apollo/Clearbit when wired) applied without overwriting user-entered text. Gaps logged explicitly as data, not silently dropped.

scoring.90_100: All required fields present; enrichment added; any gaps explicitly logged with reason.
scoring.70_89: One non-critical field missing (e.g., role title) with gap logged.
scoring.50_69: Critical field missing (phone AND email both absent OR stated problem empty) and submission still handed off.
scoring.0_49: Multiple critical fields missing; submission handed off anyway.

data_completeness.evidence_required: Submission JSON record + gap log + enrichment delta (before/after)

validation.description: Spam defenses active (honeypot check, rate limit, email MX check). Idempotency (no duplicate GHL contact on resubmit — dedupe key = email + phone hash). Out-of-scope vertical correctly declined (not handed to Abigail).

scoring.90_100: Spam caught (honeypot/rate/MX) OR legitimate submission passed all checks cleanly. No duplicate contact. Out-of-scope declined with polite offer (blog subscribe / decline email).
scoring.70_89: Minor validation gap (e.g., MX check skipped on known domain) but no downstream issue.
scoring.50_69: Duplicate contact created OR out-of-scope submission incorrectly handed to Abigail.
scoring.0_49: Spam reached Abigail/Benaiah OR multiple duplicate contacts in GHL.

validation.evidence_required: Validation log entries + GHL contact lookup (dedupe check) + downstream handoff record

handoff_quality.description: Correct route selection: phone present + in-scope vertical → Abigail; email-only or phone invalid → Benaiah; out-of-scope → polite decline. Abigail/Benaiah receives all context needed (stated problem, vertical, any enrichment) — no context loss at handoff.

scoring.90_100: Route matches rules exactly. Receiving agent has full context. Handoff event (intake.submitted) published with all fields.
scoring.70_89: Route correct but one context field missing (recovered by receiving agent).
scoring.50_69: Route incorrect (e.g., email-only submission sent to Abigail who cannot call).
scoring.0_49: Route incorrect AND receiving agent had to query source data to recover context.

handoff_quality.evidence_required: agent-bus event payload + receiving agent's first-action log

compliance.description: PII handled correctly (logged but never emailed in plaintext; phone/email hashed where referenced in events). Consent basis documented (intake = explicit opt-in). Confirmation message sent immediately and truthfully (does not promise booking if Abigail is unavailable).

scoring.100: All PII correctly handled. Consent captured and timestamped. Confirmation message accurate.
scoring.75_99: Minor PII handling slip (e.g., phone in log message plaintext) caught and remediated.
scoring.0_74: PII emailed in plaintext OR consent not captured OR confirmation message made a promise the system cannot keep. AUTOMATIC FAIL ZONE.

compliance.evidence_required: Function log scan for plaintext PII + consent record + confirmation message text

ground_truth_signals: Handoff success rate (Abigail/Benaiah received payload and acknowledged)
Dedupe correctness (duplicate contact count in GHL)
Spam catch rate vs spam bypass rate
Confirmation delivery rate (prospect received the immediate reply)
Time from form POST to handoff event (target < 5 sec)
